strengths: Extensive 15+ years of software engineering experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, AI-agent infrastructure)
Proven expertise in cloud-native development and deployment (Kubernetes, Docker, AWS CDK) with full-stack fluency
Demonstrated entrepreneurial and open-source leadership (GISCollective founder, multiple technical workshops)
concerns: Limited direct AI/ML product development experience in resume (only mentions AI-agent infrastructure)
No advanced degrees (MS/PhD) in AI-related fields despite long career
Geographic focus in Europe may limit proximity to strategic customers/partners in primary markets
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical breadth and depth in software engineering with 15+ years of experience, including recent AI-agent infrastructure work. However, his lack of explicit AI product development (beyond tooling) and absence of advanced AI degrees are significant gaps. His entrepreneurial experience is valuable but not directly aligned with cloud/AI platform strategy. The combination suggests potential but requires verification of AI-specific capabilities.
